components.value: V, S, M (drop of animal blood)

area.value: bottle of wine worth at least 10 gp

description.value: You transform one bottle of fine wine into 1 pint of animal blood, sufficient for a creature with the blood drain ability to feed upon as if it came from a Medium animal with 1 Hit Die. If you are using the optional hunger rules, this blood satiates an undead creatureâs hunger, negating any withdrawal effects, but does not grant the creature a feeding bonus.
